name: Feature request

## Problem to solve

Describe the workflow pain point and whether it targets local review, CI gating, or both.

## Proposed change

- Desired behavior:
- Why this is needed now:
- Compatibility or schema impact:
- Affected command/profile/integration surface:

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] User-visible behavior is clearly defined
- [ ] Docs updated in `README.md` / `docs/`
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Compatibility impact is documented when output/CLI changes
